bodyHtml:
Recent operator-action digest

Window: last 5 day(s) · scope=committee-chair (editorial — sees all) Items: 11 · Forecasts emitted: 0 · Positions opened: 0

Each item below was extracted by the operator from a recent editor / QA / quality review, routed to an analyst, and either completed or is mid-flight. Use this to - avoid re-asking questions another analyst already investigated - pick up contradictions noted by the editor and resolved by a peer - weight your own conclusions against fresh forecast evidence

2026-06-07 · [fact_correction] Update 'as_of' date in YAML header to 2026-06-08

IN_PROGRESS

The 'as_of' date is set to 2026-06-07, but the audit date is 2026-06-08, causing temporal inaccuracy and invalidating real-time reporting (Ref: Section 3).

  • Status: in progress

2026-06-07 · [coverage_followup] 增加库存跌价与产品价格风险分析

IN_PROGRESS

增加 inventory days、write-down、price/mix 和 gross margin 的联合敏感性分析，以应对成本冲击风险。

  • Status: in progress

2026-06-07 · [coverage_followup] 增加坏账与客户信用风险披露

IN_PROGRESS

由于 LFP FY2025 支付结构中 Credit 占比较高，建筑周期下行会放大客户违约风险，应增加相关指标说明。

  • Status: in progress

2026-06-07 · [research_task] 补充一致预期来源的详细信息

IN_PROGRESS

结论高度依赖单一一致预期来源，应补充独立券商区间、更新日期和样本数量，以提高置信度。

  • Status: in progress

2026-06-07 · [research_task] Retrieve missing airline and sector ETF performance data

IN_PROGRESS

Data for airlines (UAL/DAL/AAL) and sector ETFs (IYV, XLY, XLE) was unavailable from free sources (Section Q4). This needs to be filled during the data filling stage.

  • Status: in progress

2026-06-07 · [research_task] Collect individual stock financial data

IN_PROGRESS

Retrieve revenue growth, margins, and AI business share for AVGO, CRWD, PANW, and LULU, per Section 3.

  • Status: in progress

2026-06-07 · [research_task] 完善风险矩阵

DONE

加入 ETF 跟踪误差、杠杆产品再平衡、期权 gamma、汇率、供应链执行和模型风险。见“6. 改进清单”。

  • Outcome: Incorporated into 研究档案 and 研究档案 via model/data risk, ETF tracking-error, leveraged-product rebalancing, option gamma, FX, supply-chain execution, and model-risk execution checklist items.

2026-06-07 · [fact_correction] 补齐 16 个 ticker 的本周评级来源或修改表头

IN_PROGRESS · owner=daily-report-editor

根据 §3 审计发现 16 个 ticker 的本周评级在 my_recent_reports.md 中无法核查。需补齐本周最早/最晚评级来源；若确为新设评级，则修改 §2 表头为“周报新设评级”并说明无日报轨迹。

  • Status: in progress

2026-06-06 · [research_task] 增加历史风险指标

IN_PROGRESS

列示 SOX 近 1 年、3 年、5 年的最大回撤、年化波动率、beta 和与主要股指相关性。见“6. 改进清单”。

  • Status: in progress

2026-06-05 · [research_task] 补充2024年科创板经营现金流数据

IN_PROGRESS

报告指出2024年经营现金流“未找到官方可信合计披露”，需要通过官方渠道查找并补充该数据。

  • Status: in progress

2026-06-05 · [research_task] 核实2024年科创板研发投入数据

IN_PROGRESS

报告中2024年研发投入为1,680.78亿元，但标注“来源不明”，需核实是否为上交所2024年概览中的数据。

  • Status: in progress
